goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'sidney sussex college'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The hotel should be in the 'east' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called sidney sussex college
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the cheap price range
The hotel should be in the east and should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get star of the hotel and whether they have internet
